game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Hotline Miami is a high-octane action game overflowing with raw brutality, hard-boiled gunplay and skull crushing close combat. Set in an alternative 1989 Miami, you will assume the role of a mysterious antihero on a murderous rampage against the shady underworld at the behest of voices on your answering machine. Soon you'll find yourself struggling to get a grip of what is going on and why you are prone to these acts of violence.

Rely on your wits to choreograph your way through seemingly impossible situations as you constantly find yourself outnumbered by vicious enemies. The action is unrelenting and every shot is deadly so each move must be quick and decisive if you hope to survive and unveil the sinister forces driving the bloodshed. Hotline Miami’s unmistakable visual style, a driving soundtrack, and a surreal chain of events will have you question your own thirst for blood while pushing you to the limits with a brutally unforgiving challenge.
game_info.description: You're a mysterious operative executing a brutal mission in a neon-soaked Miami building. Clear each room of armed enemies to progress through multiple floors. One hit kills - both for you and your enemies. Plan your approach, use stealth and speed, and eliminate all hostiles to complete your mission. The challenge escalates as you advance through increasingly dangerous floors filled with vigilant guards.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move in four directions
Space: Melee attack (close range, instant kill)
Z: Shoot weapon (ranged attack, limited ammo)
Shift: Sprint (move faster, but louder)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement mechanics and validates that the player can navigate through the game world without errors. Ensures collision detection works properly with walls and that the player position updates correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player in all four directions, testing wall collision, room boundaries, and basic navigation. Alternate between normal movement and sprinting to test both speed modes.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves around the level, collides properly with walls, and position tracking works correctly. No glitches or errors occur during basic movement. Test completes without crashing.

TEST_1.expected: Player successfully moves around the level, collides properly with walls, and position tracking works correctly. No glitches or errors occur during basic movement. Test completes without crashing.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the optimal winning strategy by efficiently clearing all enemies and progressing through floors. Validates combat mechanics, enemy AI, level progression, and win condition detection.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Use intelligent pathfinding to approach enemies strategically. Prioritize melee attacks when safe, use ranged attacks for distant enemies. Clear rooms systematically, advance through floors, and eliminate all enemies to trigger the win condition.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully eliminates all enemies on all floors using a combination of melee and ranged combat. Progresses through each floor and reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state. Demonstrates the game is winnable through skilled play.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests combat mechanics including both melee and ranged attacks. Validates hit detection, enemy elimination, ammunition system, and player death conditions.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Engage enemies using different attack types. Test melee range and timing, validate shooting mechanics and ammo consumption. Intentionally take damage to test death mechanics.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Combat system works correctly with proper hit detection. Enemies die when attacked, ammo decreases with shots, and player dies when hit. All combat interactions function as designed.
